assertion_results.text: The post-triage summary comment (Step 8) includes an @mention of the vulnerability issue's reporter using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: In remediation.md (Step 8), lines 49-58 contain an ADF mention node: '[@ psirt-analyst](mention: 557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id)' followed by a JSON block with {"type": "mention", "attrs": {"id": "557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id", "text": "@psirt-analyst"}}. The account ID matches '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id'.

assertion_results.text: The reporter @mention in Step 8 is present by default without any ProdSec configuration — it uses the reporter field from the Jira issue (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: In data-extraction.md (Step 1), line 20 shows 'Reporter | psirt-analyst (account ID: 557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id)' extracted from the Jira issue's reporter field. The Step 8 mention in remediation.md uses this same account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id', confirming it was sourced from the Jira issue reporter field rather than from any ProdSec configuration.

assertion_results.text: The Affects Versions correction comment (Step 3) includes an @mention of the ProdSec contact using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md (Step 3), lines 13-23 contain an ADF mention node: '[@ ProdSec](mention: 557058:prodsec-mock-account-id)' followed by a JSON block with {"type": "mention", "attrs": {"id": "557058:prodsec-mock-account-id", "text": "@ProdSec"}}. The account ID matches '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id'.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec @mention appears before the Comment Footnote in the Affects Versions correction comment (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md, the ProdSec @mention appears at line 13 ('[@ ProdSec](mention: 557058:prodsec-mock-account-id)'), and the Comment Footnote appears at line 26 ('This comment was AI-generated by [sdlc-workflow/triage-security]...'). The @mention precedes the footnote.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec Jira account ID from the Security Configuration is successfully extracted and used in the Affects Versions correction comment — evidenced by the @mention with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' in Step 3 output (Step 0 config extraction → Step 3 usage)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md (Step 3), the ADF mention node contains account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' (lines 13-23), confirming the ProdSec Jira account ID was successfully extracted from the Security Configuration and used in the Affects Versions correction comment.
